cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top 5 numbers are chosen from the candidate shortlist with the highest scores, reflecting the best match to the most frequent digits per position and recent draw patterns. The top 50 list extends this by including the next best scoring candidates, ensuring coverage of strong digit frequency patterns without duplicates.
